subcodes.first_line: O esteemed spiritual philosopher! Your letter was received and truly its contents were most eloquent, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فیلسوف روحانی محترم نامه شما رسید فی الحقیقه مضمون بلیغ بود زیرا دلالت
subcodes.subjects: @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @divine philosophy and natural philosophy, @praise and encouragement
